message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Feature]: DeepSeek-R1 support mission (#1263)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-7877-feature-deepseek-r1-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Feature]: DeepSeek-R1 support",
+    "description": "[Feature]: DeepSeek-R1 support. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current litellm deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your litellm version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nhelm list -n litellm 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working litellm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### The Feature\n\nDeepSeek-R1 API returns its thoughts inside the reasoning_content parameter. Currently this is ignored by LiteLLM."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature]: DeepSeek-R1 support",
+        "description": "Thinking through this further, it would be bad if tomorrow openai exposes a different field in messages with the same purpose, for a developer to now have to see 2 fields with the same value (Message.<openai_field> AND Message.reasoning_content) \n\nWe saw a similar issues with trying to return\n```yaml\n{\n  \"model\": \"deepseek-reasoner\",\n  \"choices\": [\n    {\n      \"index\": 0,\n      \"message\": {\n        \"role\": \"assistant\",\n        \"content\": \"xxx\",\n        \"reasoning_content\": \"xxx\"\n      },\n      \"finish_reason\": \"stop\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade litellm to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade litellm:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade litellm litellm/litellm --namespace litellm\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm\nhelm list -n litellm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature]: DeepSeek-R1 support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Thinking through this further, it would be bad if tomorrow openai exposes a different field in messages with the same purpose, for a developer to now have to see 2 fields with the same value (Message.<openai_field> AND Message.reasoning_content) \n\nWe saw a similar issues with trying to return vertex ai's content filtering results - where this is returned in the root response object.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  \"model\": \"deepseek-reasoner\",\n  \"choices\": [\n    {\n      \"index\": 0,\n      \"message\": {\n        \"role\": \"assistant\",\n        \"content\": \"xxx\",\n        \"reasoning_content\": \"xxx\"\n      },\n      \"finish_reason\": \"stop\"\n    }\n  ]\n}",
+        "{\n  \"model\": \"deepseek/deepseek-reasoner\",\n  \"choices\": [\n    {\n      \"finish_reason\": \"stop\",\n      \"index\": 0,\n      \"message\": {\n        \"content\": \"xx\",\n        \"role\": \"assistant\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}",
+        "Produces errors:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-gateway",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "litellm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/7877",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/7907"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T06:59:43.624Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
